name: spinner-badge
visual_summary: The Spinner Badge is an animated circular indicator that displays a numeric or alphabetical value, often used in real-time data or progress tracking. Typically placed in a compact area, it visually communicates data that is being loaded, calculated, or updated. Suitable for displaying brief information or status updates.
